endpoints.name: Check
endpoints.description: Test that the API and auth are working.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ZAPIER_API_KEY}} with your ZAPIER API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get Configuration Link
endpoints.description:
If the user wants to execute actions that are not exposed, they can
go here to configure and expose more.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ZAPIER_API_KEY}} with your ZAPIER API KEY.

endpoints.name: List Exposed Actions
endpoints.description: List all the currently exposed actions for the given account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ZAPIER_API_KEY}} with your ZAPIER API KEY.

endpoints.name: Execute App Action Endpoint
endpoints.description:
Give us a plain english description of exact action you want to do.
There should be dynamically generated documentation for this endpoint
for each action that is exposed.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ZAPIER_API_KEY}} with your ZAPIER API KEY. Replace {{EXPOSED_APP_ACTION_ID}} with a real exposed_app_action_id.
